---
title: "\'Hints on Reading\'"
---

## \'Hints on Reading\'

**Author:** Anne Sturges Bourne
**Date:** 1860
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (September 1860) 329-333.

### Notes

This continues the discussion on health issues for young women begun in Sturges Bourne\'s article with the same title in the July issue.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
